message:
Add genome postscripts: per-agent and per-role customization layer

- Genome class: loadPostscripts(), loadAgentPostscript(), savePostscript() methods
- Postscripts directory added to genome init (DIRS constant)
- Postscripts interface: global + orchestrator + worker + agent-specific
- buildSystemPrompt() composes postscripts after agent prompt, before environment
- Agent loads agent-specific postscript from genome at runtime
- Factory loads role postscripts once, passes through agent hierarchy
- Children inherit role postscripts; each loads own agent-specific postscript
- 6 genome postscript tests + 3 prompt assembly tests
